column1: I'm meeting Andy_____________the cinema in an hour.
Have you seen the new building ___________front of the school?
My new job starts___________the first day of Agust.
We're going to Martin's to see their new baby___________Wednesday evening.
See if there are any tomatoes___________the fridge, will you?
We'll all have computers connected to our brains___________the future.
I don't feel like playing chess____________the moment.
I think there's someone____________the door. I'll go and check.
